coverage_rules.description: Office visits covered at 90% after deductible

full_text:
Gulf Health Insurance - Standard Health Plan 2025

Section 1: Coverage
This plan covers medically necessary services including office visits, laboratory tests, and hospitalization. Office visits (CPT 99213, 99214) are covered at 90% after the annual deductible of SAR 300. Laboratory work including CBC (85025), metabolic panel (80053), and venipuncture (36415) are covered at 100% with no copay.

Section 2: Exclusions
The following are excluded from coverage: cosmetic surgery, experimental treatments, weight loss surgery, services not medically necessary.

Section 3: Benefit Limits
Annual maximum benefit: SAR 1,000,000. Per-incident maximum: SAR 200,000. Office visit annual limit: SAR 75,000.
full_text_ar:
تأمين الخليج الصحي - خطة التأمين الصحي القياسية 2025

القسم 1: التغطية
تغطي هذه الخطة الخدمات الطبية اللازمة بما في ذلك زيارات العيادة والفحوصات المخبرية والاستشفاء.
